nodes.label: Test: WikiController per-op timeout forwarded to buildAgentRunner
Mobile Guard — ingest/lint/init blocked on mobile, query allowed
format-migration.test.ts — settings migration for format operation
domain.test.js — JS duplicate of validateDomainId tests
applies entity_types_delta from ingest and emits domain_updated with merged types
MIPROv2 prompt optimization pattern
nodes.rationale: Uses DSPy MIPROv2 with auto=light and no bootstrapped/labeled demos to perform lightweight prompt optimization; post-optimization placeholder restoration ensures template variables survive rewriting.

nodes.label: Domain Concept (Source Folder → Wiki Folder Pair)
Domain Architect (domain-map.json generator)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Generates a domain entry for domain-map.json with id, name, wiki_folder, source_paths, entity_types, language_notes fields

nodes.label: EntityType Structure
nodes.contributor: rationale: Each entity_type has: type, description, extraction_cues, min_mentions_for_page, wiki_subfolder — subfolder must be one word without slashes or domain_id

nodes.label: wiki_subfolder Rule (one word, no slashes)
nodes.contributor: rationale: wiki_subfolder must be a single word, no slashes, no domain_id prefix. Valid: network, processes. Invalid: os/network, os_network

nodes.label: Format Schema Frontmatter Fields
nodes.contributor: rationale: Non-wiki frontmatter: tags, aliases, created, updated, external_links (only if http URLs exist in body), related (wikilinks only if already referenced in body). wiki_* fields excluded — managed programmatically

nodes.label: Format Schema Content Rules
nodes.contributor: rationale: Hard prohibitions: no invented facts (except vision image extraction), no fact deletion, no meaning distortion; all changes listed in report

nodes.label: {{placeholder}} template syntax
nodes.rationale: Templates use {{placeholder}} syntax so that restore_placeholders() can ensure named slots survive MIPROv2 rewriting, preserving prompt structure through optimization.

nodes.label: DSPy MIPROv2: automated prompt optimization via Optuna
ClaudeCodeLM: DSPy-compatible adapter for Claude CLI
